name: sbox-claude
description: Build s&box games by talking to Claude. Bundles the Claude Bridge MCP server (160+ tools), a screenshot-driven game-dev workflow skill, a schema-grounded s&box API skill (Unity→s&box translation + components/UI/networking/physics references, adapted from claude-sbox), and an optional sbox-game-dev specialist agent. The s&box editor addon must be installed separately (see README).
